decisions.decision: Hero card includes CTAs (Directions/Alert/Calendar) as full decision-making unit
decisions.rationale: User can see flavor and act without scrolling

decisions.decision: Side-by-side cone layout (120px cone left, text right)
decisions.rationale: Proven layout, fits above fold at 375px

decisions.decision: Hero card is ONLY content above the fold, strip header/subtitle
Remove signals and multi-store glance sections
decisions.rationale: Near-zero traffic, power user features without users

decisions.decision: Keep week-ahead (collapsed) and simplified CTA line below fold
Minimal first-visit: one sentence + store picker + nearby stores
decisions.rationale: Product explains itself via hero card, not instructions

next_action: Run /gsd:plan-phase 31 to create execution plans from the CONTEXT.md decisions
